source_pr.title: planner: update planner test cases to use plan_tree to avoid unnecessary code changes caused by estimation update
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #63118

Problem Summary: planner: update planner test cases to use `plan_tree` to avoid unnecessary code changes caused by estimation update

### What changed and how does it work?

planner: update planner test cases to use `plan_tree` to avoid unnecessary code changes caused by estimation update

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Insufficient evidence in PR description/diff to classify a flaky root cause; this PR primarily updates golden tests to use `plan_tree` to reduce churn from estimation changes.
failure_signature: Insufficient evidence: no explicit flaky failure signature described; needs CI logs or a reliable repro.
root_cause_explanation: Insufficient evidence to determine the underlying root cause from the available case data; needs CI logs or a reliable repro.
fix_pattern: planner: update planner test cases to use `plan_tree` to avoid unnecessary code changes caused by estimation update

evidence: evidence: err := testKit.ExecToErr("explain format = 'plan_tree' SELECT country, product, SUM(profit) AS profit FROM sales GROUP BY country, country, product with rollup order by grouping(year);") (pkg/planner/core/casetest/physicalplantest/physical_plan_test.go)
